name: Seeed XIAO ESP32-C3
notes: Seeed Studio XIAO ESP32-C3: a thumbnail-sized 21 x 17.5 mm board on the ESP32-C3 (single-core RISC-V, 4 MB flash). 11 GPIO pins broken out as D0-D10 on castellated pads, 7 per side.

Every XIAO shares the same footprint and D0-D10 silkscreen, but the D-pin to GPIO mapping is different on each model - this is the C3 mapping. Do not reuse a C3 wiring diagram on a XIAO ESP32-S3 or C6.
External antenna: the C3 has a u.FL/IPEX connector with a detachable antenna. Keep it plugged in - range is poor without it.
GPIO2 (D0), GPIO8 (D8) and GPIO9 (D9) are strapping pins; GPIO9 doubles as the BOOT button. They work as normal IO once the board is running, but avoid driving them to the wrong level during reset.
BAT+ / BAT- pads on the underside charge a 3.7 V LiPo over USB.

2.label: D0
2.note: Silk D0 / A0. Strapping pin - avoid holding low at reset.

5.label: D3
5.note: Silk D3 / A3. ADC2 channel - unreliable while Wi-Fi is on.

8.label: D8
8.note: Silk D8. Default SPI SCK. Strapping pin.

9.label: D9
9.note: Silk D9. Default SPI MISO. BOOT button / strapping pin.
